back_translation: And these are the genealogies of Aaron and Moses, on the day the LORD spoke to Moses on Mount Sinai.
And these are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the firstborn, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, who were ordained to serve as priests.

And Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD in the wilderness of Sinai; and they had no sons, so Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests during the lifetime of Aaron their father.
The LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
"Bring the tribe of Levi and have them stand before Aaron the priest, that they may serve him.
They shall keep his duty and the duty of the whole congregation before the Tent of Meeting, performing the service of the tabernacle.
And they shall take care of all the furnishings of the Tent of Meeting, and the duty on behalf of the Israelites, performing the service of the tabernacle.
And you shall give the Levites to Aaron and to his sons; they are given, given to him absolutely, from among the Israelites.
And you shall appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall guard their priesthood; and the outsider who comes near shall be put to death."
And the LORD spoke to Moses again, saying:
"Behold, I have taken the Levites from among the Israelites in place of every firstborn who opens the womb among the Israelites; and the Levites belong to Me.
For every firstborn is Mine. On the day I struck every firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated to Myself every firstborn in Israel, from man to beast; they shall belong to Me; I am the LORD."
And the LORD spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying:
"Number the sons of Levi according to their ancestral houses, according to their clans; every male from a month old and upward you shall number them."
And Moses numbered them according to the word of the LORD, as he had been commanded.
And these were the sons of Levi by their names: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their clans: Libni and Shimei.
And the sons of Kohath by their clans: Amram and Izhar, Hebron and Uzziel.
And the sons of Merari by their clans: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites according to their ancestral houses.
From Gershon, the clan of the Libnite and the clan of the Shimeite; these are the clans of the Gershonite.
Those counted of them according to the number of every male from a month old and upward — those counted of them: 7,500.
The clans of the Gershonite shall camp behind the tabernacle, toward the west.
And the leader of the ancestral house for the Gershonite was Eliasaph son of Lael.
And the duty of the sons of Gershon at the Tent of Meeting: the tabernacle and the tent, its covering, and the curtain of the entrance of the Tent of Meeting,
and the curtains of the courtyard, and the curtain of the entrance of the courtyard, which is around the tabernacle and around the altar, and its cords, for all its service.
And to Kohath, the clan of the Amramite and the clan of the Izharite and the clan of the Hebronite and the clan of the Uzzielite; these are the clans of the Kohathite.
According to the number of every male from a month old and upward, 8,600, keepers of the duty of the sanctuary.
The clans of the sons of Kohath shall camp on the side of the tabernacle to the south.
And the leader of the ancestral house for the clans of the Kohathite was Elizaphan son of Uzziel.
And their duty: the ark and the table and the lampstand and the altars, and the furnishings of the sanctuary with which they serve, and the curtain, and all its service.
And the leader of the leaders of the Levites was Eleazar son of Aaron the priest, the oversight of those keeping the duty of the sanctuary.
From Merari, the clan of the Mahlite and the clan of the Mushite; these are the clans of Merari.
And those counted of them, according to the number of every male from a month old and upward: 6,200.
And the leader of the ancestral house for the clans of Merari was Zuriel son of Abihail; they shall camp on the side of the tabernacle to the north.
And the assigned duty of the sons of Merari: the frames of the tabernacle, and its crossbars, and its posts, and its bases, and all its furnishings, and all its service,
and the posts of the courtyard around, and their bases, and their tent pegs, and their cords.

And those camping before the tabernacle, eastward, before the Tent of Meeting toward the sunrise: Moses, and Aaron and his sons, keeping the duty of the sanctuary as a duty on behalf of the Israelites; and the outsider who comes near shall be put to death.
All those counted of the Levites whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the word of the LORD, according to their clans, every male from a month old and upward: 22,000.
And the LORD said to Moses: "Number every firstborn male of the Israelites from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.

And you shall take the Levites for Me — I am the LORD — in place of every firstborn among the Israelites, and the livestock of the Levites in place of every firstborn among the livestock of the Israelites."
And Moses numbered, as the LORD had commanded him, every firstborn among the Israelites.
And every firstborn male was, according to the number of names from a month old and upward, for those counted of them: 22,273.
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
"Take the Levites in place of every firstborn among the Israelites, and the livestock of the Levites in place of their livestock; and the Levites shall belong to Me; I am the LORD.
And for the redemption of the 273 who exceed the Levites, from the firstborn of the Israelites,
you shall take five-five shekels per skull (head), according to the sanctuary shekel you shall take — twenty gerahs is the shekel.
And you shall give the silver to Aaron and to his sons, the redemption of those who exceed among them."
And Moses took the silver of the redemption from those exceeding above the redeemed of the Levites.
From the firstborn of the Israelites he took the silver: 1,365 shekels, according to the sanctuary shekel.
And Moses gave the silver of the redeemed to Aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the LORD, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
